summary: Frontend-only testing of LP-WEB-002 v2.0 four homepage additions. All 4 elements are present and functional. Minor copy variations (quoted phrases) vs spec text.

issues: Closing line reads 'This is what "protected authority" looks like in practice' — quotes around 'protected authority'. Spec says without quotes. Minor copy variation.
Title is 'What "Protected Authority" Means' with quotes. Spec says 'What Protected Authority Means' without quotes. Minor copy variation.

action_items: Optional: Remove quotes from 'protected authority' in closing line (WhatGetsBuiltSection.jsx line ~128) to match spec exactly.
Optional: Remove quotes from 'Protected Authority' in block title (TheStandardSection.jsx line ~95) to match spec exactly.
critical_code_review_comments: counter-explainer-2 spec says 'five moments where we stop and verify' (lowercase) — implemented as 'Five moments' (capitalized). Functionally OK, minor spec deviation.
Both closing line and PA block title have quoted phrases not in spec — consistent style choice but deviates from exact copy spec.
